title: McDonalds Inspired Fry Helmet
description:
I got the helmet on bedrock but not on java and wanted to learn how to make it, so I used blockbench for the first time lol. It uses a carved pumpkin

tags: french fry, mcdonalds, fry hat, movie, minecraft movie, jack black, steve
body: There's a bedrock helmet already for something completely unrelated that just happens to resemble this one, so I decided to make a helmet based off of something I thought would be pretty cool. It is inspired by the McDonalds helmet, but it is not being directly stolen or copied, as the original model for this was a netherite helmet already in the game then I decided to make it red and add yellow things on the top of it because I thought it looked cool. This also doesn't have qanything to do with McDonalds, because there isn't any of their branding on the item, and I just decided to use that as a reference for the thing I made. Anyways, enough yapping and I hope you all (the 4 people that see this) enjoy my helmet, I think you're able to message me on here if there's any issues or you can message me on discord, rockywtkau.
